nasb.text: Moreover, the Jordan was its border on the east side. This was the inheritance of the sons of Benjamin, according to their families and according to its borders all around.

esv.text: The Jordan forms its boundary on the eastern side. This is the inheritance of the people of Benjamin, according to their clans, boundary by boundary all around.

cnv.text: 東方的疆界是約旦河。這就是便雅憫各家族所得的產業四圍的疆界。

ccb.text: 东面以约旦河为界。这是便雅悯人按宗族分到的土地和四周的边界。
